mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.nick_name AS nickName, u.username, u.phone, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, u.gender, u.campus_id AS campusId, c.name AS campusName, u.auth_status AS authStatus, u.status, u.ban_reason AS banReason, u.score, u.deactivate_time AS deactivateTime, u.last_login_time AS lastLoginTime, u.create_time AS createTime, u.update_time AS updateTime FROM user u LEFT JOIN campus c ON u.campus_id = c.id WHERE u.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
